However, puzzle me this...I purchased two six-packs of the spread in late October 2011, purchased through and shipped by Amazon. Order totaled $26.04, so shipping was free!
Now I see that the price is $32.36 per six-pack, a 248% increase in six months! This price is from Baker's Box, Inc. How is this price justified? Does Amazon itself still offer this product?
Please can someone answer this? Thanks.

Summary: Great candy my family loved it
Text: Great candy and our family loved it.  It was smaller than I imagined it and I thought it was expensive for how small it was.  However, I am in Germany and can get it easier here.  The shipping to the USA makes it expenive.  Great product and fun for our USA family to receive.

Summary: A fine and sturdy everyday tea
Text:
This is a very drinkable blend of Assam, Ceylon, and Kenyan black teas from PG Tips, one of the UK's most popular brands. Although some California grocery stores (and Cost Plus World Market) stock this tea, I had not tried it until reading helpful reviews on Amazon.

Each PG Tips bag weighs 38 percent more than the Lipton bag (that is available in the USA). As expected, PG Tips makes a stronger brew. Each PG Tips bag has so much tea that I can easily make a 12 ounce mug with a single bag. I drink my tea black, but PG Tips is clearly robust enough to maintain character with milk or sweetener.

PG Tips is a sturdy, straight-ahead blend with more strength than Lipton's. It is a caffeine-rich tea - in part because each bag has more tea than other brands.

PG Tips uses a pyramid shaped bag that allows more room for tea leaves to expand while steeping. Does it make better tea? I don't know, but it is a point of differentiation.

HINT: PG Tips also makes a Special Blend black tea that is only slightly more expensive in stores. I much prefer the Special Blend to their regular black tea. The PG Tips Special Blend is a very hardy and rich breakfast tea. The Special Blend is more sensitive to longer steeping times (I usually steep mine less than 3 minutes), but I find the taste more complex and satisfying.

Cognoscenti typically prefer loose tea. Tea bags contain the less expensive "fannings" or "dust," remains from processing loose leaf tea. And with some others brands of tea (not PG Tips), many people can taste the paper used in the bag.

If you (like I) sometimes appreciate the convenience of bags, I recommend trying PG Tips as a sturdy everyday tea. And, I more strongly recommend their Special Blend as a hardy and rich breakfast tea.

Have purchased these tea bas before. I bought them in hope of having stronger . No real success, but will keep trying.
Received package in timely manner.

Summary: Capt'n Eli's: The BEST of the Best!!
Text:
After first trying Virgil's root beer a few years ago, I have become a bit of a soda connoissuer - especially with root beer. Once you get past the big name brands, you'll find there is a wide world of truly delicious flavors out there that corn syrup and industrial processes could never offer. I have tried tons of specialty root beers out there, easily over 20 in all. If I haven't heard of it, in an impulse I'll buy it, and Capt'n Eli's is the best stuff I've found!

Capt'n Eli's uses all natural ingredients including wintergreen oil, anise, vanilla, and other various spices. This doesn't make it particularly different from Virgil's or other top quality root beers. However, there is something special about this one. Capt'n Eli's is superbly clean and crisp with a vibrant multitude of flavors that will dance down your throat as its ultra-creamy head satisfies your every taste bud. It is super-creamy, super-delicious, and ultra-lively. It is the most vibrant, lively root beer I have ever tasted, and if I want real refreshment I far prefer one of these over anything else. The stuff is seriously tough to put down! So, what are you waiting for? Don't think, just buy! You can thank me later :)
Perform as promised.  No problems with "blobs" since my dog chews 'em up real well.
This makes a great gift for a lovely 89 year young Brit who hasn't been home in a few years. The oooo's and aaah's make worth the search.

i have 4 dogs, 3 of them love these peanut butter crackers, the last one finally came around, now he eats them too. they seem a little dry, but i don't think they'll go to waste. price was good. shipping time was fine.

Summary: They've discovered what Cats love to eat!!!
Text:
I'd heard this before, they've worked out there formula that for older fussy cats - they've determined what it is that cats love to eat. I've fed my cats on Royal Canin. Dry food when they were younger switched to canned when they were older to ensure they get enough liquid in their diets.

My cats love this stuff!!!

Summary: Tastes pretty good, but not organic
Text: These are pretty good chocolate covered raisins.  The chocolate is not very sweet, and is almost a semi-sweet chocolate taste.  The raisins are good, but not as good as organic raisins.  Would be 5 stars if the ingredients were organic.
My 35 pound lab/terrier mix loves this food. I used it as a mix-in with her kibble. Everything arrived from the vendor in tip top shape. Will order again.
This would be great coffee for a lover of very strong coffee.  It is certainly full bodied and very dark.  I gave it to  my boss.. HE LOVES IT.  just not my 'cup of coffee'

Just as described and pictured.  Rainbow jimmies and the little round sprinkles mixed together.  Not an expert on sprinkles....they taste like I expected.  Got them super fast along with some bonus chocolate sprinkles too!  Nice!

The first time I tried these we had gotten them in a gift basket at work. It was love at first taste! Not your typical ginger spice cookies. First, they are paper thin, well maybe not paper but perhaps potato chip thin. Which makes them as addictive! They also have a little more bite on the end of the flavor. To me they are my favorite cookies! I can see having these with ice cream, whipped cream or just all on their own. They are the best!

Summary: Expensive taste at a cheap price
Text: I originally tried Cafe Bustelo with a stovetop espresso maker and was not too impressed. However, I have since upgraded to a nice pump-driven espresso maker, and cannot say enough about how good this is. Excellent flavor for a fraction of the cost of other brands. This is all I buy now and and trying to figure out if they make decaf as well.

This is a very flavorful cookie with a nice texture. It is also low in Carb. I have used the crumbs from these cookes to replace a grahmcracker crust and was extreemly pleased with the results. It is my only "must have in stock" cookee!

Summary: Strong Ginger Flavor, With Wonderful Aftertaste Of Mango.
Text:
Not too long ago, I tried Chimes Ginger Chews and I loved them. I found them at a nearby Fresh and Easy Neighborhood Market and, at the time I noticed there were two varieties available. I bought the "original" flavor. However, now in coming back I picked up a second packet (1.5 ounces) 0f Mango Chewy Ginger Candy. It's good. Real good. Wonderfully chewy. It has a strong ginger flavor, plus a strong after-taste of mango. Very unusual candy, and quite delicious. The chews come individually wrapped. Best of luck for getting them out of their wrappers. Believe me, you'll understand what I mean. It's well worth the trouble, however..

Gary Peterson

This salt is so tasty!  It tastes nothing like the iodized table salt.  This has a light, mild taste that greatly enhances meats, vegetables, etc.  It's pink/peach color also looks very pretty in my clear Cole/Mason grinder.  It grinds very finely with no issue.  In fact, this salt grinds so finely that it leaves a fine coating, almost like a powder, around the inside of the clear grinder.  If you're a neat freak, this might bug you a little and you might find yourself wiping out the top of the grinder.  Great salt and the bag lasts a long time.

This sweetener takes about a tablespoon to get the same sweetness as 1/2 of a tsp of others on the market, so is very expensive overall.  No aftertaste though, so if money is not a concern, I would recommend it.
This is a very good buy and allows you to get sweetness by using less of it. The sugar value is unique to say the least.

I cook Indian food frequently and yes, it does take time, so I decided to try a ready made product.  I will not buy these again as they definitely don't have the blending of spices so necessary to get an authentic result.  And, the amount of "cottage cheese" was very skimpy.

Almonds,peanuts, sunflower seeds,cranberries, pomegranates and blueberries are a delicious blend in this snack bar.

The texture is not rock hard, nor too chewy. It is perfect.

The taste is nutty, semi-sweet,not disgustingly sweet and has a clean and healthy taste. With 190 calories a bar, it is perfect for between meals or to get by a long day on a light lunch.

I really like the taste ,texture and appreciate the wholesome ingredients. I'd recommend them in a heartbeat as a healthy snack bar.

This coffee has a wonderful flavor and provides the convenience of a one cup brew instead of a pot.  You may also purchases flavors and it's as good as the $5.00 cup you get at one of the coffee chains.  The automatic refill program offered is an excellent and convenient way to make sure you never run out!
Good tea. Lemon is pretty good when served warm, even though it's typically thought of as a cold beverage. If you like it, the multi-pack is a good way to save money.

Summary: Love the smell & like the flavor
Text:
I gave this four stars based on the flavor (according to my own taste preference of course) but I would give ten stars to the aroma! It fills the kitchen with such a wonderful scent. Back to the flavor though, it's a gentle pecan taste with a just under medium roast flavor. So to many I believe it would be considered weak. You could brew a smaller cup or more likely if you like your coffee strong, you probably are not looking at this product anyway! If you are looking for strong order a variety that is bold or extra bold. I like to have a variety of K cups without paying the sampler pack prices and this fits the bill for my home. I have started with a 50 pack of a known favorite and then 24 packs of other flavors that I think I would like to try and have to offer to company.

UPDATE: After running through a number of varieties I can tell you we ran out of the Pecan pretty quick. I still love the aroma and like the flavor and it's definitely one I would order again.

My husband has recently switched to drinking predominantly decaf and this was a good choice for him.  He's a rare man, one who enjoys flavored coffee.  He likes the vanilla flavor and the low acidity is easy on his stomach.  I enjoy it as well.
I tried alot of coffee i like it strong but not bitter.This is good stuff.

Summary: House Blend is a perfect Blend!
Text: I had received samples in the mail for Tully's coffee K-cups and as soon as I smelled the House Blend brewing, I knew it would be special.  No doubt....I was not disappointed!  Impressive indeed!

Love Cliff bars, but have only liked the Peanut Butter and Chocolate Chip Peanut Crunch flavors (maybe an occasional Blueberry).  The others are too sweet for my taste.  These are my new favorite.  Great taste combination.  Go Cliff Bars!

This hard candy arived very promptly and in perfect condition.

I like fruit flavored hard candy and I had been looking for a source of "all natural" hard candy for some time. These GoNaturally hard candies provided the perfect solution. They are very good!
I gave these to my British husband at Christmas. He was so excited and ate everyone! Walkers has the best Toffee and shortbread by far!

I really love this stuff. Gives my chicken a bit of zip, but not too crazy spicy. The only problem is that it is outrageously expensive. I don't know what's in it that makes it cost so much. Maybe they put gold dust in there or something?
The dried tart cherries are very tasty.  I was looking for something healthy to eat as a snack.  These cherries certainly meet that requirement.

Our dogs adore these and they are usually fairly pricey for the amount you get. However Amazon always has one great deal or another for buying these and significantly cheaper than in store prices.

We usually buy the 130 or 96 pack of 'Teenies' for our two chihuahua mix dogs (depending whichever has the better sale price at the time.

The teenie size is great for our smaller dog (6lb) as he can fully chew on it and savor it. However it is not quite enough for our other chihuahua mix (13lb) she tends to gulp it down like any other dog treat without getting as much benefit from the dental cleaning that Greenies are supposed to help with. Now that she is a little larger (she loved these as a pup) I think we may 'graduate' her to the next size of Greenie.

I have always found that our dogs look forward to their Greenie treats and see them as a special treat which is great because keeping a dogs dental health in check is important and I find Greenies do help with this and yet are delicious to the dog.

Our larger dog has been given Greenies for two years now and her teeth are still almost entirely stain free and her breath is not as bad as some dogs. However I would not use Greenies solely to keep a dogs breath in check, I recommend getting some other product for that.

Summary: Ditch the Soda and Grab a Mojito
Text: The Mojito is one of my favorite adult drinks.  There are some pretty nasty tasting Mojito mixes out there, but this isn't one of them.  Making the drink is pretty simple, because all you have to do is pour the mix into your water, chill it, and TA DA you have a great tasting drink.  If you like lemonade, and are ready for something different, try the Mojito.  Each packet makes 10 quarts, and each serving is only 5 calories.  If you're looking for a low-cal alternative to soda, this is a refreshing choice.

All of my cats adore these treats. One cat in particular nags me constantly to feed him some and if I don't give him enough, he jumps up beside me and pokes me repeatedly with one claw. Great price, too!!!
This is a really great cat food, my guys are crazy about it.  A little pricey, but it delivers.
I did not check the ingredients and did not notice that the product CONTAINS MSG, unfortunately for me, grocery items are not returnable.
This wasabi-flavored product seems more horseradish than wasabi.  I doubt there is ANY real wasabi in it, more token flavoring.

Please understand, that when I take the time and write a review, I am very truthful and sincere. I am not in a contest to see how many reviews that I can
write. However, I am trying to help the people not to waste their money on a product. This peppered beef jerky, is without a shadow, the nastiest jerky
that I have ever tasted. I know about jerky. I make jerky myself sometimes. This jerky is like chewing on a piece of "Fat Back", you have to wipe
the grease off your chin and hands after trying to eat it. I don't believe that is 97% fat free. You can wring the grease out of it. These comments
that I am making are concerning the package that I received. Other people who commented highly on this product, must have received a much different
product than I received or has never eaten any real beef jerky.

The package was made in the U.S is all the information that I can find concerning the product. Doesn't say where the beef is from or any info of this
nature. I will not eat this beef jerky, it is sickening. Take heed people, if you want and like jerky, DO NOT buy whatever this stuff is............

Summary: fantastic product and even better seller!!
Text: We first had this hot sauce on our honeymoon in St. Lucia and we were bummed that we couldnt bring any back with us.  However, we were able to find it here on Amazon.  I mistakenly had the shipping address incorrect (never changed to the new address) and once I noticed it and contacted Amazon and the seller, they were able to re-rout it after it had already been shipped.  I cant thank both the seller and Amazon for great customer service.  And the sauce is awesome, delicious and of course, HOT. Order a bottle and you wont be disappointed....unless you dont like spicy stuff!
My son loves this Aussie licorice and I couldn't find it anywhere EXCEPT on Amazon. It was shipped very promptly (in time for Xmas)and it disappeared all too quickly.

Several years ago I was reluctant to buy Kashi cereals because
the picture on the box always looked like there were hard
ingredients and I cannot chew hard things.

Now that I have been told I am a diabetic and attended classes
for this problem, all the dietitions praised this cereal (all of
their products) and I now have my cupboard full of their cereals.

Don't hesitate - this is really healthy food and also, I am still
losing weight - watch the amount you eat and have a bit of fresh
fruit with it!
When I popped the popcorn, I expected more.  But overall the taste was great, alittle on the salty side.

Summary: The most repulsive thing I've ever eaten
Text: When you buy an item like this, you know the chances of it being great or even good are fairly slim, but you expect that it will be edible. In the case of Thai Kitchen's Pad Thai bowl, that's a hideoussly misguided expectation. The "vegetables" included are dried shavings, not even as substantive as the tiny carrot chunks you get in a Cup O' Soup; and the sauce? It's like some terrible sweet and sour sauce you'd get from McDonald's--terminally sweet, with no hint of anything I've ever tasted at even a budget-on-the-run Thai restaurant. I've never had anything so repulsive--and I once mistook chocolate syrup for gravy and served it on turkey.

My family and I stumbled on this seasoning in our local grocery store. We LOVE to use it to season steak, burgers, ribs, even chicken!  The store stopped carrying it, so to Amazon I went. We highly recommend this as the best seaoning for meat!

For the 3 yrs I've owned an espresso machine, I've never had a pump for my syrups... Thought I'd give it a try and I am in love!! It never drips, like a lot of pumps do. And if you want to lock it in the down position after each use just simply twist it on your last down pump. It's fantastic!! I would definitely order this again, especially for the price! No mess with the sticky syrup is key!

Our three cats don't like this variety. Probably because of the herring.
You would figure thyey would love the fish but I guess has too much of a fish odor.
Although the delivery man was a tad bit creepy and I almost didn't open my door, I am glad I did. The roses are beautiful and smell amazing and the delivery guy was cool as heck!

Summary: Liked it More Than We Thought We Would
Text: This is the second Kraft Velveeta Skillets Dinner Kit we've tried and we found it surprisingly good. The pasta is orzo, which if you're not familiar with it is the size and shape of rice. The kit comes with the pasta, a flavor packet and cheese sauce. The cheese is your standard Velveeta and the flavor packet has a mild broccoli flavor. Like rice, orzo tends to pick up the flavors around it. Also like rice, orzo is easy to over cook, so pay attention to the instructions and the stage your pasta is at. These are mild flavors and smooth consistencies, which may make them appropriate for children as an introduction to broccoli. We enjoyed it quite a bit.
I was not a fan of marshmallow cookies but this one is different. The combination that works for me is the dark chocolate covering, combined with the graham cracker bottom. Good stuff!!!!

I love blueberries so much, it is great to be able to have a bar that I can take with me everywhere that I can get my fill of blueberries anytime I want them.  As a diabetic I have found that all of the bars that I have tried by granola gourmet have not spiked my blood sugar, so it really makes me feel really comfortable and satisfied at the same time.

Like most dogs I have met, our dogs HATE getting their meds. These things take the headache out of giving medication to dogs.  The dogs get so excited for these pill pockets, and they are easy to use.  The pockets are very soft, so if you live in a hot and humid place, they will turn into a pile of mush.  However, you can easily just take a piece of mush and wrap it around the pill.  The dogs don't care if it is shaped properly or not.  Our dogs just swallow it hole and sit there waiting for another one.

Salada Asian Plum White tea is a light tasting tea with just a hint of plum flavoring in each sip. Some people, like Dr. Oz, claim that white tea has more beneficial qualities than the more popular green tea. Try it. I think you'll like it.

This phone case is spectacular! I purchased one for myself and am in LOVE with the case.  I receive so many compliments on the case.  I purchased one for a wedding planner as an extra thank you gift, and she went absolutely crazy - it was the sweetest thing!  The case is beautiful yet very sturdy and durable.  I would highly recommend this purchase as a gift for anyone that you want to impress, while spending a small amount of money.  The case looks like it costs at least double the price!  It is a must have!

I personally do not like this coffee.  However my husband loves it because it is very strong.  I like a nice medium cup, so this is not for me.  I tried it once and just could not drink it.  My husband says its a real full bodied coffee.
Wheat Free, Gluten Free, Low Sugar and Sodium and very easy to digest.  Nice taste and I feel great afterwards. Excellent for a Healthy Lifestyle.

My wife loves this tea. More than that, she love this brand of Chai Tea.  We tried to find it in are grocery stores and no one keeps it in stock.  The scent is really what does it for my wife but it tastes good and has just the pick-me-up you need.

Growing up I have always been a huge fan of chocolates. Hershey chocolate has always been one of my favorite. When this product was first introduced I thought it was a pretty neat concept that I can have a pouch of hershey chocolate with me anywhere, well that was the idea until I bought one. Let me warn you guys before hand because these little bastards are addictive. The other night I bought a pack from CVS since they go on sale for about 3 dollars a pouch, which is a great deal. I opened the pouch and started eating little by little while I was watching Breaking Bad on netflix. Next thing you know, halfway through one episode I finished the whole bag. It was really a sad and horrific moment at the same time. Sad because I finished it within 20 minutes but horrific because these bad boys are really high on the calorie count. For about every 15 pieces, it measures up to 200 calories. Considering I ate the whole bag, I probably racked up to 600-700 calories within 20 minutes, but then again that is my fault because I have no self control. The taste is great, and really easy to chew on. They are very smooth and melts in your mouth. Overall, this is an amazing snack but very unhealthy for someone like me who has no self control over chocolate.

Thanks for reading my review! Hopefully I helped and if you have any questions or comments please let me know.

Having purchased a package of this tea and one of Stash's Pinhead Gunpowder Green, I can safely say that the Gunpowder is much better tea. The "Organic Premium" is unacceptably heavy on stems and twigs, with an unpleasantly mulchy taste. The Gunpowder, on the other hand, is much lighter and more delicate. Same price, same distributer, both organic. Stash Gunpowder is simply better.

Summary: Why use a brewer for instant coffee?
Text: This stuff is NASTY.  I don't even think it's particularly good instant.  Why would anyone spend all that money on a keurig coffee maker in order to make instant coffee at home?  You just need a kettle or a microwave.  And what a waste of space in your kitchen and landfill.  The worst part is that you don't know it's instant until you taste it, look carefully at the package, and see that it's "water soluble"-- code words for instant.  Open one up, and you'll see!
The coffee has smooth, light taste.  You can taste the flavoring, which is a nice change from some K-Cups where you can only smell the flavor.  Nice job, Folgers.

If you don't like strong coffee, you probably won't like this. I thought it had a very good, rich flavor. I don't care much for Columbian or some dark roasts, but I thought this was good. Will buy again.

These chips were part of my recent diet in lieu of regular chips. The sour cream & onion and cheddar flavors are the best of the bunch (I purchased a variety pk b4 these) and are a great option to help you eat a little better. No luck getting the kids to eat them though.

This product is unbelievable, the eggs are perfect not too salty.
The best way to eat this is with blinis and a dollop of fresh creme, followed by a shot of Vodka!
This is a snack definitely from Russia with Love.

I saw these mentioned on a raw foods site and decided to check them out. I just tried them for the first time. I snipped open the bag and ate one... and then another and another. I had to finally force myself to use some self control and stop munching on them. I like olives well enough, but there's a savory richness to these that could well make them addicting... moist chewy texture, tasty tartness, not too salty. I can think of a few recipes I'd like to try these olives in, if I can keep myself from snacking on the whole bag of them "as is." I just ordered another bag because I don't think this one will last very long.
The Millstone carmel truffle coffee haa an excellant and bold flavor.  I would not hesitate to order this again in the future.

Summary: Sage Tea helps with night sweats
Text:
I have one cup a day and it really decreases my night sweats. I'm in amazement at how much it helps!

The taste isn't great, but I don't think it's as bad as some other reviews have said. If you're concerned about the taste, you can use some sage from your spice cabinet and make a cup. It tastes pretty much the same, but it didn't seem cost effective to use the sage you buy in the spice aisle.

Summary: Great Green Tea, and CHEAP too!
Text: What can I say?  It's green tea, it's organic, it comes from my good friend Paul and his daughter and it's a very good green tea, much better than Lipton or most stuff in my supermarket.  And the price is GREAT!  If you drink green tea, buy it!

Summary: Barbara's Bakery Original Shredded Meat, 13-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 4)
Text:
I purchased the Barbara's Bakery Original Shredded Wheat for my pet goat to eat. Lately, I've noticed that he's been putting on a lot of pounds due to eating high fat leather shoes and other junk he finds in the garbage. Barbara's Bakery Original Shredded Wheat is pretty healthy and tastes good, at least that is what he tells me when he's not drunk.

It is pretty basic Shredded Wheat, so it's cleaned up and nice. Some people might be put off by the appearance of the Shredded Wheat, it looks like a 17th century buffoon wig or a haphazard pile of old textile fabric, a nest for blind moles, or even a coiled spider web. I don't mind, I just put it in milk. If you wear glasses, it'll just look like a white blur to you.

If you suffer from dementia, or can't see that well, just a note to add, Barbara's Bakery Original is changing their logo and box covers. Don't be alarmed if you get a new cleaned up Barbara's Bakery box that looks nothing like the old. I did notice some Shredded Wheat all over the box, and I didn't even open it yet. I hope it's still fresh.

Summary: Not a K-cup but works in a Keurig
Text: As the other reviewers have said, this is not a K-cup! I uploaded an image of one of these pods next to a K-cup for comparison. The difference is the filter is exposed in these pods as opposed to being fully sealed in a K-cup. Since the coffee is exposed to the air when you open the package, you will have to seal them with a clip or put them in an airtight bag or tupperware to prevent the rest of the pods from loosing freshness. Having said that, in my experience they are a great inexpensive alternative to use in your Keurig brewer. The 36 count boxes arrived as unmarked brown cardboard boxes, not the colorful retail packaging shown on amazon. Inside each cardboard box, there are three clear heavy duty plastic bags, each of which holds 12 of the pods. The bags are not resealable!

The Lindt Lindor Truffles Milk Chocolate are the best. They are creamy in the middle with a harder outer shell. They melt in your mouth. They are to die for. They are much better than any other Truffles.

I'm old-school in the toothpick department. We'd fill old Rx bottles with cinnamon oil that we bought at the drugstore and eat them on the bus. The hotter the better.

Personally, I think these babies are great for everything from weight-control to quitting smoking. Sugar free too. Packs pop in your purse. Yes, I'm a lady but I still love me some cinnamon-picks!

Summary: Great treats even my picky cat loves! AND good for teeth : )
Text: Both my cats love these treats (even the really picky one!) They'll chase them around the house as a game -- they're a huge hit! They seem to love all the flavors pretty equally... I love that it's good for their teeth while still being a treat they enjoy.
These taste like sweet and salty seaweed (nori).  If you like nori, you'll like these,

Summary: healthy and good, but too salty
Text: My kids love these soy crisps, and they're healthy, too. I find them just a bit too salty, though.

I love this with almond milk and fresh fruit in a bowl for breakfast. This was the first item that got me hooked with all their other products. Great for carrying on business trips especially since its hard to find good quality vegetarian, vegan and raw vegan food.
It's sweet because of the fruit and agave, yummy!

I make my own in large batches and yes these are high quality non-animal based ingredients....can't really compare that to animal based products... I supplement good quality products such as these with what I create and prepare at home.
I love Rosemary chips, but can't find any at my location. I was glad I came across these, at such a great price.
this was bought for a friend who only drinks decaf.  I would guess she is happy.  Arrived before expected date.

I love salt & vinegar chips and I love Blue Diamond almonds so I was delighted to find a combination of the two.  They make a great snack and a great substitute for chips with a sandwich.  They are a little tart and a little sweet, YUMMY!
Had to buy another box of the same thing at Petsmart. She eats those.  Must not be fresh.  How can you tell when they look the same.

This blend was hard to find. My wife and friends were throwing me a retirement party for my 20 yrs in the USAF. I had a crazy thought ... I'll look on Amazon! Since we live in Delaware, and not Louisiana, filè is hard to find. What do you know it was on there. It came on time and I had an outstanding retirement party.
These are gggrrreeeaattt tasting almonds! Got these directly from Amazon and glad I did as they are a bit tough to find around here. Nice spice to them!

Summary: Great food topper for my dogs
Text:
I have been feeding this to my 1 year old maltese and 4 month old chihuahua. I mix this in with their dry food and they both enjoy it a lot. It's a great deal buying from amazon compared to buying it at a pet store.

The only down side is this food does dry up after leaving it out for 5-10 minutes.

Bold, full flavor.  I like strong coffee.  This is not one of the strongest coffees but it does have great flavor, like a coffee shop coffee.  I like to keep this flavor in my mix.  Not bitter, nice smooth taste.

Wow--these new Chips Ahoy cookies are A-M-A-Z-I-N-G. When they say "Megafudge" on the outside of the package, they aren't kidding. It's a burst of deep, dark chocolate flavor in every soft, chewy bite. I wouldn't say they're "gooey;" that's probably more of a marketing tactic, but they are definitely soft and chewy. They remind me of the old Archway dutch chocolate cookies but with more chocolate flavor and moistness.

I would definitely recommend them if you're looking for something sweet and chocolate-y. It was difficult to stop at eating just one. So I stopped with two.

This is the best champagne mustard, harrington's sells it for $2.00 more plus shipping & tax. It goes so nicely with the honey hams for easter, thanksgiving, christmas or whenever.  We love it and so do all our guests who sample it, they end up  buying some for themselves!
great snack, with a great price! I would recommend, I enjoy the cliff brand especially this flavor. It is neutral and not overwhelming.
My personal opinion is they are terrible. I will not recomend them, or buy them again. NO FLAVOR AT ALL
I love to enjoy a cup of this delicious tea every night.  The taste is smooth and fruity.  I will continue to buy this tea.

We generally order our tea from a store in Alaska, but saved more than 75% (loose tea is expensive) on this bag.  I'd like to try other kinds in this brand, and it's certainly worth a try, but I think it's weaker.  Though, that still makes it worth it -- use twice as much, and you're still paying less.  I wouldn't recommend if you're a "tea specialist" or as a gift for a known tea-lover, because it's visually and tastes cheap, but it's not awful if you order it for yourself and know that it's a little less exciting than other ones.  The bag is nice and keeps it fresh, or at the very least, it doesn't make it lose its flavor.

This is a great value lapsang souchong tea. It has a good smoky flavor and aroma - not too strong but not too weak. I was a bit skeptical about the cheaper price, but I must say it was more than worth it. I drink it daily and will purchase it again when my bag is gone.
